blockers.description: Auth gate (AuthGate.tsx) blocks all internal pages. The thirdweb client ID is set to 'placeholder', making real wallet connection impossible. Every route (/cockpit, /org-chart, /dashboard, /agents, /agents/new) shows the WalletAuthScreen instead of the actual page content. All 14 assigned assertions are untestable through the browser.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Navigated directly to each internal URL (/cockpit, /org-chart, /dashboard, /agents, /agents/new) — all show auth gate sign-in screen. No workaround available without modifying production code (prohibited by testing rules).

summary: Tested 14 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 14 blocked. All assertions are blocked by the auth gate — thirdweb client ID is 'placeholder' so wallet connection is not possible, and the WalletAuthScreen intercepts every route. Screenshots confirm the auth gate consistently blocks /cockpit, /org-chart, /dashboard, /agents, and /agents/new.
